小说中往往会存在着受剧情控制，爱而不得的角色，他们无法得到女主的关注和爱。
如果给他们放开这种限制，是不是会有一个不同的结局呢？
女主还会选择原书中的男主吗？
又争又抢又如何？
抱歉啊男主，我是来横刀夺爱的。
世界一：男主的青梅女友
“糯糯，我这里很干净，没人亲过，你试试？”
（绿茶+心机+bt）
世界二：破镜重圆文里，处于口欲期的联姻对象
（口欲期+反差感+引导型恋人）
“夫人，可以给我咬一口吗？”
世界三：病娇文里，装高岭之花的诱引者
（女主病娇+刻意引诱）
世界四：竹马还是天降？
竹马：是天降，不过降太早，成竹马了。
世界五：可是，我是她的白月光啊。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c1ab84edc80af389b70be4c3b52b1bf2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"圆圆的小汤圆","author_id":"","book_id":"7599101267335449662","book_name":"攻略女主后，男主让我当当","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":475,"name":"破镜重圆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=475&name=破镜重圆&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":470,"name":"替身","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=470&name=替身&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599101394133467710","read_count":"23371","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"210609"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"104","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,校园,系统,1v1,病娇,破镜重圆,替身","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic-r/3ee02c1591bd71a98a2caadfc74e0aba~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444336&x-signature=5wVkCVYxpi46BFxVGREqx65c5YE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"617287451936740","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_re
